faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before booking

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Every project is different, and we believe in transparent, custom pricing that matches your exact needs. Most wedding packages start from ₪8,000, portrait sessions from ₪1,500. Contact us for a free consultation and detailed quote within 24 hours — no obligations.

items.question: Do you travel outside the center of Israel?
items.answer: Absolutely! We cover all of Israel — from Eilat in the south to Metula in the north. Travel is included in most packages. We've shot weddings at Dead Sea resorts, Galilee vineyards, Negev desert locations, and everywhere in between.

items.question: How long until we get the photos?
items.answer: Typical turnaround is 2–4 weeks for weddings and 1–2 weeks for portrait and commercial sessions. We'll give you a sneak peek of 10–15 images within 48 hours of your shoot so you have something to share immediately.

items.question: What if we don't like the results?
items.answer: We include unlimited revision rounds in every package. We don't stop until you love every single image. In our 350+ weddings, we've maintained a 100% satisfaction rate — and we intend to keep it that way.

items.question: Can we get both photos and video?
items.answer: Yes! We work with trusted videography partners and can offer combined photo + video packages. Ask us about bundle pricing during your consultation.

items.question: What should we prepare before the shoot?
items.answer: We'll send you a detailed preparation guide after booking. For weddings, we'll coordinate with your planner. For portraits, we'll advise on wardrobe, location scouting, and timing for the best light.

items.question: Do you offer printed albums?
items.answer: Yes, we offer premium hand-crafted albums in various sizes and finishes. Album design is a collaborative process — we create the layout and you approve every page.

items.question: What is the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Cancellations made 30+ days before the shoot receive a full refund minus deposit. Cancellations within 30 days can be rescheduled to a new date at no additional cost, subject to availability.

about.title: About MC Studio
about.subtitle: The story behind the lens
bio: MC Studio was founded with a simple belief: every moment deserves to be captured perfectly.
We're not a photography factory — we're a boutique studio that gives every project our full creative attention.
Our approach combines technical excellence with genuine human connection, because the best photos happen when people feel comfortable and free to be themselves.

values.title: Perfection, Not Compromise
values.description: We don't deliver 'good enough.' Every image is edited, refined, and perfected until it meets our standards — and yours.

values.title: People First
values.description: Behind every lens is a human connection. We take the time to understand your story, your style, and your vision.

values.title: Anywhere, Anytime
values.description: Your perfect location shouldn't be limited by geography. We travel anywhere in Israel to capture your moments.
